title: Background Block
description: A beginner's mod for easier use of chroma key to make videos.
body:
**Background Block**, is a simple mod that added 6 solid color blocks and 6 glowing solid color blocks.

This can be useful when you need an in-game blue or green screen.

## Detail

| Block Color | Hex |
|-------|-------|
| Red | #FF0000 |
| Blue | #0000FF |
| Green | #00FF00 |
| Yellow |	#FFFF00 |
| White | #FFFFFF |
| Black | #000000 |
